# Set up shared package + monorepo config

### Description
Initialize the shared package and finalize monorepo configuration.

### Checklist
- [ ] Init `packages/shared` (package.json, tsconfig, index.ts entry)
- [ ] Add `UserRole` enum, `ApiResponse<T>` utility types
- [ ] Root `.env.example` with all required env vars
- [ ] Move JWT secret from hardcoded string to `process.env.JWT_SECRET`
- [ ] Run `pnpm install` to lock all dependencies
